validators.name: Isolated Codex CLI final review
validators.summary: The final hardening commit passed the full gate and had no actionable regression.

resolved_findings: align objective length with JSON Schema Unicode semantics
remove the hidden HTTP client deadline
redact error and Stringer values without panic or repeat rendering
make repeated config flags consistently last-one-wins
require observed readiness in the process smoke test

acceptance.criterion: daemon starts and becomes healthy within the local smoke budget
CLI creates and inspects a synthetic run
invalid transitions and malformed contracts fail closed
